title: Homemade evacuation pod

'''Homemade evacuation pods''', also called '''Kashyyyk Pods''',<ref name="ROTS ICS" /> were simple vessels constructed by the [[Uurbahhahvoovv Joiners & Artisans]] for last-resort evacuation by the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. Capable of propelling a single passengers into [[Planet/Legends|interplanetary]] space, one of these [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pods]] was utilized by [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] to flee Kashyyyk after the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] [[Battle of Kashyyyk/Legends|battle]] during which [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] was executed.

==Characteristics==
These simple, [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]]-made vessels were created by the [[Uurbahhahvoovv Joiners & Artisans]], who undertook a sturdy and practical construction to accommodate a single Wookiee passenger. The homemade pods were created using pieces cobbled together from shipwrecks, including their three [[Sublight engine/Legends|sublight]] [[Engine/Legends|thruster]] nozzles. These were situated on the base of the conical vessel, located below the fuel tank, [[Reactor/Legends|reactor]], and [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] pit. A single seat was fitted into the pod's central section, with both adjustable seat restraints and a headrest designed to accommodate a Wookiee's frame and height. A control panel was located to the occupant's left. Above, a sensor processor, [[Navigation computer/Legends|guidance computer]], and an optical sensor window were built into the pod's conical tip.<ref name="ROTS ICS" />

The exterior of the evacuation pod was fitted with a heatproof hull, which reflected the practicality of the ship's design, and the Wookiees' sturdy construction. Curved stabilizer fins ensured a stable and rifled ascent through Kashyyyk's [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]]. The ship's fuel capacity was enough to blast its passenger into interplanetary space, at which point they would utilize the vessel's [[distress beacon]] to call for rescue from any nearby [[Starship/Legends|starships]].<ref name="ROTS ICS" />

==History==
[[File:Wookpod.jpg|thumb|left|Jedi Master Yoda escaped Order 66 in an evacuation pod.]]
As [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Droid Army]] began overrunning the [[Forest/Legends|forests]] and [[Lake|lagoons]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] during the late stages of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] defenders prepared thousands of last-resort evacuation pods in hidden locations.<ref name="ROTS ICS" />

Although the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] was ultimately victorious during the [[Battle of Kashyyyk/Legends|Battle of Kashyyyk]], the struggle ended around the time that [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] issued [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] to his [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]]. [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] fled his former allied forces, enlisting the help of [[Tarfful/Legends|Tarfful]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] to reach an evacuation pod hidden behind bushes in a remote location. Yoda bade farewell to his Wookiee friends, and departed the planet aboard the pod.<ref name="ROTS" /> He deactivated the onboard distress beacon, knowing it would be a tell-tale signal intercepted by enemy forces, and instead relied upon his Jedi emergency transmitter to send his ID and location through encrypted channels. The signal was intercepted by [[Alderaanian/Legends|Alderaanian]] agents on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], searching for surviving Jedi, who informed [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]] of the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master's]] position.<ref name="ROTS ICS" /> Yoda's pod was discovered by Organa's vessel, the [[Sundered Heart/Legends|''Sundered Heart'']], and he and his escape craft were brought on board.<ref name="ROTS">{{Film|III}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:WookieeEscapePod_ICS.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A cross-section of [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda's]] pod.]]
The homemade evacuation pod was created for [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']], as one of two escape pods used by [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] in the film.<ref name="ROTS" />
